refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall enable achieving the customer-defined productivity target by optimizing equipment operation and task execution efficiency.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad and outcome-focused; refining it into sub-FRs clarifies specific functional aspects that contribute to productivity, enabling targeted design and verification.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure productivity metrics (m³/h or ton/h) during representative operations and compare against the customer-defined target over the evaluation period.
sub_frs: FR1: Optimize equipment operational efficiency to maximize throughput.
FR2: Support effective task planning and execution to minimize idle time.
FR3: Provide real-time performance feedback to operators and tele-operators.

candidate_dps: DP1: Implement advanced vehicle control algorithms to enhance operational efficiency.
DP2: Integrate task scheduling and dispatching system to coordinate work execution.
DP3: Develop real-time telemetry and feedback system for performance monitoring.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1: Implement advanced vehicle control algorithms to enhance operational efficiency.

potential_sources: Interaction between vehicle control and task scheduling modules.
Data exchange between telemetry feedback and control algorithms.
coupling_check.notes: DP1 is logically decoupled but requires well-defined interfaces with DP2 and DP3 to avoid tight coupling.

assumptions_risks: Assumes vehicle control algorithms can be effectively modularized.
Risk of performance degradation if control algorithms are not optimized for real-time constraints.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider modularizing telemetry feedback separately to reduce coupling with control algorithms.

im_boundary.name: Vehicle
im_boundary.scope: Physical and software components responsible for vehicle control and operation.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Vehicle control module outputs operational data for monitoring.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Receives task commands and schedules from higher-level coordination modules.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Bidirectional communication channel for remote control and data exchange.

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment of vehicle control logic; low diffusion as interfaces are well-defined.
Broader scope; control logic less contained, higher diffusion due to multiple responsibilities.
Limited containment; mostly interfaces for remote control, not direct vehicle control.
Minimal containment; safety functions are separate and do not contain control logic.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Vehicle module is the most appropriate boundary for implementing advanced vehicle control algorithms due to high containment and low diffusion scores.
containment_risks: Potential interface complexity with Teleoperation and NGHE Solution modules.
Risk of overlapping responsibilities if task scheduling logic is not clearly separated.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Clarify interface contracts and ensure strict separation of control and tasking functions across modules.

fr_dp_gate.reason: Selected DP logically satisfies the refined FRs with clear mapping and manageable coupling.

diffusion_risks: Some diffusion risk exists at interfaces with Teleoperation and NGHE Solution modules.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Vehicle module shows strong containment of control logic, supporting architectural clarity.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed via telemetry data and operational testing within the Vehicle module.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of control functions to Vehicle module supports ownership and verification.

recommended_revisions: Refine interface definitions to reduce diffusion risks.
Consider separate IM for task scheduling to improve modularity.

decision.justification: While the decomposition and assignments are sound, interface diffusion risks and potential overlap in task scheduling require refinement before proceeding.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Optimize equipment operational efficiency to maximize throughput.
FR2: Support effective task planning and execution to minimize idle time.
FR3: Provide real-time performance feedback to operators and tele-operators.

revise.why: To clarify and tighten interface boundaries and reduce diffusion risks between Vehicle, Teleoperation, and NGHE Solution modules.

assumptions: Vehicle control algorithms can be modularized within the Vehicle IM.
Telemetry and tasking interfaces are sufficient for inter-module communication.
open_risks: Interface complexity may cause integration challenges.
Potential overlap of task scheduling responsibilities.
evidence_needed: Preliminary integration test results demonstrating low diffusion impact.
